case_title: TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC INC. VS. GARFIELD BLAKLEY

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BLAKLEY, GARFIELD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 34 SIXTH STREET, ROOM #622, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94103, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, LEASE FORFEITED, ***THE RENTAL AGREEMENT IS CANCELED***; SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT BLAKLEY, GARFIELD
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC INC.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC INC. SERVED JAN-24-2020, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT BLAKLEY, GARFIELD
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC INC. AS TO DEFENDANT BLAKLEY, GARFIELD SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BLAKLEY, GARFIELD
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC INC.
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC INC. AS TO DEFENDANT BLAKLEY, GARFIELD
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT BLAKLEY, GARFIELD
